hyperedges.label: AI Context Pack System (llms.txt + .ai-context.md + repo-map)
Production Observability Triad (Render Alerts + Sentry + CI Smoke)
P0 Blockers: Auth + Math Migration + DashboardView Split + server.py Split
Craft-Codex Gate Sequence: Shape -> Direction Questions -> Palette -> Mock Approval -> Code
Critique Dual Assessment: LLM Design Review + Deterministic Detector -> Synthesis
Polish as Terminal Quality Gate Fed by All Sub-Commands
Impeccable Design System (product + spatial + typography references)
Runner DNA Data Pipeline (Garmin + Strava + fitness/freshness)
Backend Stack (FastAPI + Motor/MongoDB + AI providers)
Training Plan Generation Pipeline (VDOT + history_context + generateTrainingPlan)
Local Whisper GPU Inference Stack (faster-whisper + cuDNN + cuBLAS)
Garmin SSO OAuth Flow (HTML page + ticket extraction + postMessage)

nodes.label: Runtime Architecture (Vite React SPA + FastAPI monolith)
nodes.rationale: Frontend is a Vite React SPA; backend is a FastAPI-style monolith in backend/server.py; MongoDB via Motor; frontend points at VITE_BACKEND_URL with Render fallback.
nodes.norm_label: runtime architecture (vite react spa + fastapi monolith)

nodes.label: Data Sources (Strava + Garmin)
nodes.rationale: Strava is main activity source with local multi-athlete support (active flag). Garmin provides running dynamics via CSV import. Runner DNA combines Strava history, fitness/freshness, best efforts, and Garmin dynamics.

nodes.label: Critical Invariants (security + cadence + data integrity)
nodes.rationale: Never expose secrets; keep queries scoped by athlete_id; use _get_active_strava_token(); preserve Render memory constraints; normalize cadence to spm; Garmin CSV cadence authoritative when matched; Runner DNA V2 must show N/D for missing data.

nodes.label: Strava Multi-Athlete Local Support
nodes.rationale: strava_tokens stores multiple athletes; one has active:true; backend uses _get_active_strava_token() instead of last-token-wins; new endpoints for status/connections/switch/disconnect; ProfileView manages athlete switching.

nodes.label: VDOT History-Aware Training Generation
nodes.rationale: history_context captures stop days, recent volume, quality sessions, easy ratio, aerobic base, readiness, CTL/ATL/TSB; stop history softens VDOT and shifts plan phases to Base Aerobica; quality history reduces Base and moves earlier into Intensita.

nodes.label: Versioned Git Pre-Commit Hook
nodes.rationale: Hook in .githooks/pre-commit runs npm run context:check and blocks commits when repo-map.md/json are stale. core.hooksPath=.githooks required.

nodes.label: AI Context Pack Architecture
nodes.rationale: llms.txt as first-read entrypoint; .ai-context.md as curated architecture context; docs/ summaries; scripts/update-ai-context.ts generator for deterministic repo-map. Purpose: let any LLM understand repo without rereading all source files.

nodes.label: #1 Auth Multi-Tenant (P0 blocker)
nodes.rationale: Without auth the app cannot be sold as SaaS. No user_id isolation means second user overwrites first. GDPR compliance impossible (no right to erasure). Requires adding user_id to all Mongo collections, backend JWT middleware, migration script, frontend AuthProvider.

nodes.label: #3 Client-Side Math Migration (P0)
nodes.rationale: Architecture rule: client=view, backend=compute. Browser freeze on mobile. Each component recomputes same aggregates. Formula changes require frontend deploy. Modules to migrate: runnerDnaModel.ts (~700 LOC), detrainingModel.ts (~250 LOC), injuryRisk ACWR, bestPbTime, thresholdPace.

nodes.label: #14 DashboardView God Component Split (P0)
nodes.rationale: DashboardView was 1775 lines, reduced to 1215 (-560) by extracting FitnessChart, HRZones, NextOptimalSessionWidget. Still ~1215 lines, target <800. Test impossible with too many hook dependencies. Merge conflicts frequent.

nodes.label: #15 server.py God File Split (P0)
nodes.rationale: server.py is 7521 lines mixing many domains. Hot reload slow. PR diffs unreadable. Plan: FastAPI router-based split into routers/ and services/. Pre-requisite: add pytest smoke tests before refactor.

nodes.label: #17 SSE Live Updates (DONE)
nodes.rationale: SSE event bus + 5 event types + useServerEvents() hook + auto-cache-invalidate on sync_complete. Pending: Garmin sync hook, Toast UI component.

nodes.label: #21 i18n Hardcoded Strings (P1)
nodes.rationale: ~150 hardcoded IT strings remain in widgets. 4 namespaces added (onboarding/errors/widgets/sync). User switching to EN sees ~50% UI in Italian. Blocks international expansion.

nodes.label: METIC LAB Tech Stack
nodes.rationale: React+TypeScript+Vite frontend; FastAPI Python backend; MongoDB Motor; Mapbox/MapLibre maps; Recharts+custom SVG; Claude/Gemini AI with fallback algorithmic logic.

nodes.label: 8 Rounds of Fix History
nodes.rationale: Round 1: dead-code/math cleanup. Round 2: architecture (useApi cache, nav dedup). Round 3: security (CORS, rate limit, secrets audit, ESLint, bundle). Round 4: production-readiness (CI, Vitest, onboarding, ErrorBoundary, Sentry stub). Round 5: architecture patterns (SSE, i18n, DashboardView split, server.py router, thresholdPace backend). Round 6: mobile, a11y, polish, scaffolds. Round 7: observability triad (CI smoke, Sentry, OPS guide, deploy+CORS fix). Round 8: P0 advancements (DashboardView -41%, server.py 9/55, auth scaffold).

nodes.label: Render Build/Deploy Failure Alerts
nodes.rationale: Round 5 pushed broken code; Render kept old version silently for 24h. Configure deploy-failed/build-failed/service-suspended email or Slack alerts on dani-backend-ea0s and dani-frontend-y63x.

nodes.label: Sentry Error Tracking Frontend
nodes.rationale: Sentry SDK wired in telemetry.ts; activated by VITE_SENTRY_DSN env var on Render. Errors in prod widgets were invisible before. On auth landing, add identifyUser(profile) for multi-tenant user context.

nodes.label: CI Backend Smoke Test Gate
nodes.rationale: backend/test_smoke.py has 6 tests: import test for Render layout (CWD=backend/), dev layout, GET /, version endpoint, SSE endpoint, 8 critical routes. CI blocks PR merge on failure.

nodes.label: Top 3 PRD-Reality Gaps
nodes.rationale: 1) RF-BADGE-01 obsolete: PRD claims 100+ badges but only 1 (Passerotto) remains after round 4 cleanup. 2) RF-MEDAL-01 never implemented: 6-level medal system zero code. 3) RF-WEEK-01 frontend missing: weekly report backend endpoint exists but no frontend component consumes it.

nodes.label: Training Adapt Models PRD vs Reality Divergence
nodes.rationale: PRD claims 5 models (Impellizzeri/ACSM/Foster/Seiler/Mujika) but backend implements 5 different models (ACWR/TSB/VDOT-drift/Compliance/Race-Proximity Taper). Only Mujika shared. Recommendation: fix PRD to document reality.
nodes.norm_label: training adapt models prd vs reality divergence

nodes.label: PRD — METIC LAB Running Training Dashboard
nodes.author: Daniele Pascolini
nodes.norm_label: prd — metic lab running training dashboard

nodes.label: Product Vision (Scientific Running Dashboard)
nodes.rationale: METIC LAB applies peer-reviewed scientific models (Daniels, Banister, Seiler, Foster, Mujika) to auto-adapt training plans. Target: amateur/intermediate runners (VDOT 35-55) targeting specific races.

nodes.label: MongoDB Collections Schema
nodes.rationale: Active collections: profile, runs, training_plan, analytics_cache, runner_dna_cache, strava_tokens, garmin_csv_data, recovery_checkins, gct_analysis, fitness_freshness, user_layout. PRD v1.0 listed obsolete names (profiles, training_weeks, vo2max_history, adaptation_log, tests).

nodes.label: VDOT System (Jack Daniels Formula)
nodes.rationale: VO2 = -4.60 + 0.182258*v + 0.000104*v^2. 5 training zones (Easy/Marathon/Threshold/Interval/Repetition). Daniels 2/3 rule + cap +1 VDOT per mesocycle. VDOT history computed runtime from runs, not stored in vo2max_history. history_context attenuates VDOT after stop periods.

nodes.label: AI Coach 3-Level Stack
nodes.rationale: 1) Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic, temperature 0.9). 2) Google Gemini fallback. 3) Algorithmic fallback offline. 9-section run analysis. JARVIS voice assistant uses Gemini on client side.

nodes.label: Render Backend Service (dani-backend-ea0s)
nodes.rationale: Python web service; rootDir: backend; startCommand: uvicorn server:app; Python 3.11; frankfurt region; free plan. rootDir caused import bugs in round 5 (from backend.X failed).

nodes.label: Render Frontend Service (dani-frontend-y63x)
nodes.rationale: Static site; buildCommand: npm install && npm run build; publishDir: dist; SPA rewrite rule /*->index.html. Random suffix y63x caused CORS issues in round 3-7 until whitelist was corrected.

nodes.label: Shared Design Laws (Impeccable)
nodes.rationale: Match implementation complexity to aesthetic vision. Vary across projects. Never converge on same choices. Interpret creatively.

nodes.label: AI Slop Anti-Pattern Principle
nodes.rationale: If someone could say 'AI made that' without hesitation, the design has failed. Reject: cyan/purple gradients, glassmorphism, neon accents, gradient text on metrics. Bold means distinctive, not more AI effects. Reflex-reject font list maintained (Inter, DM Sans, Space Mono, etc.).
